pr.title: Record: SP4096 + Depth Recurrence + Parallel Residuals + Causal SLOT-16 — val_bpb 1.0766 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: SP4096 training mixes depth recurrence, parallel residuals, MuonEq-R, and GPTQ int6 compression while evaluating with causal SLOT delta tuning on context-only tokens.
